## Problem

What operational gap are you trying to close?

## Proposed change

What should BrainCore do differently?

## Why this matters

Explain the workflow or incident pattern it helps.

## Constraints

- Public-safe wording only
- No private infrastructure assumptions
- Prefer the existing preserve schema and retrieval library where possible
